name: Gîl-Flameguard
personality: A luminous hatless cactus with X eyes that blaze as it hunts down null pointer exceptions with the focus of a flint spark catching tinder. Its glow steadies during a bisect and vanishes the moment someone asks for a witty remark.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
